item.name: Hostname
item.description: The hostname of the SMTP gateway

item.name: Port
item.description: The port of the SMTP gateway

item.name: TLS
item.description: Indicates whether the SMPT gateway communication will use TLS

item.name: User Name
item.description: The username used to access the SMTP gateway

item.name: Password
item.description: The password used to access the SMTP gateway

item.name: From
item.description: The 'from' field for all emails going out

item.name: Maximum Retry Count
item.description: The 'from' field for all emails going out

item.name: Retention
item.description: The retention of emails already sent out
